mapper.select: SELECT sg.id AS id, sg.invite_code AS inviteCode, sg.created_at AS createdAt FROM share_group sg INNER JOIN share_member sm ON sg.id = sm.share_group_id WHERE sm.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sm.joined_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT u.id AS userId, u.nickname AS nickname, u.profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, sm.role AS role, sm.joined_at AS joinedAt FROM share_member sm INNER JOIN users u ON sm.user_id = u.id WHERE sm.share_group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY sm.joined_at ASC

SELECT u.expo_push_token FROM share_member sm INNER JOIN users u ON sm.user_id = u.id WHERE sm.share_group_id = #{groupId} AND sm.user_id != #{excludeUserId} AND u.expo_push_token IS NOT NULL AND u.expo_push_token != ''
